---
title: "CV"
output:
  pagedown::html_resume:
    self_contained: false
---

# Aside

<p style="text-align:center;">
<img class="circular--square" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/phrmendes/phrmendes.github.io/main/images/profile.jpg" style="width: 95%">
</p>

## Contact {#contact}

-   <i class="fa fa-envelope"></i> [phrmendes\@tuta.io](phrmendes@tuta.io)
-   <i class="fa fa-github"></i> [github.com/phrmendes](https://github.com/phrmendes)
-   <i class="fa fa-phone"></i> 11 948012603
-   <i class="fa fa-linkedin"></i> [Pedro Mendes](https://www.linkedin.com/in/pedro-mendes-b9983b13a/)

## Skills {#skills}

-   <i class="fab fa-r-project"></i> R - Advanced
-   <i class="fa fa-git"></i> Git - Intermediate
-   <i class="fab fa-github"></i> Github - Intermediate
-   <i class="fab fa-docker"></i> Docker - Intermediate
-   <i class="fas fa-cloud"></i> Google Compute Engine - Intermediate
-   <i class="fas fa-file-excel"></i> <i class="fas fa-file-powerpoint"></i> <i class="fas fa-file-word"></i> Office - Intermediate
-   <i class="fas fa-database"></i> SQL - Intermediate
-   <i class="fab fa-linux"></i> Linux - Intermediate
-   <i class="fab fa-linux"></i> Shell Script - Intermediate
-   <i class="fab fa-python"></i> Python - Beginner 
-   <i class="far fa-star"></i> Spark - Beginner

<i class="fas fa-download"></i> [Download PDF](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/phrmendes/phrmendes.github.io/main/docs/CV.pdf)

## Disclaimer {#disclaimer}

This resume was made with the R package [**pagedown**](https://github.com/rstudio/pagedown).

Last updated on `r Sys.Date()`.

# Main

## Pedro Mendes {#title}

I have two year's experience in the IT market, working as technical support for operating systems while doing basic administrative tasks; and four months' experience as an economic analyst, also working with data science. I was a research assistant at UFABC's scientific initiation program, currently enrolled in the 12th period in Sciences and Humanities and the 7th period in the Economics' bachelor's degree programs. My interests are econometrics, machine learning, Linux systems, and programming in R, Python, Shell Script and Emacs.

## Education {data-icon="graduation-cap" data-concise="true"}

### Federal University of ABC

Bachelor in Economics

São Bernardo do Campo, SP

2023 - 2018

### Federal University of ABC

Bachelor in Sciences and Humanities

São Bernardo do Campo, SP

2022 - 2018

### Fatec São Caetano do Sul

Information Security (Unfinished)

São Caetano do Sul, SP

2016 - 2015

### Senai Roberto Simonsen

Telecommunications

São Paulo, SP

2014 - 2012

## Research {data-icon="laptop"}

### Scientific Initiation Program (PIC-UFABC)

CECS - UFABC

São Bernardo do Campo, SP

2021 - 2020

::: {.concise}
-   I researched Brazil's Central-West region exports, as well as the 2000s commodity cycle and its relationship with the region's agro-industrial complex. To do this, I used data from Comex Stats and did analysis in R.
:::

## Work Expericence {data-icon="suitcase"}

### Economic analyst

Abramge

São Paulo, SP

Now - 2022

::: {.concise}
-   Data processing and package creation in R, creation and maintenance of SQL databases, analysis and interpretation of public data from the private health sector, creation of reports and dashboards using the Shiny package, and creation of statistical models.
:::

### Economics internship

Abramge

São Paulo, SP

2022 - 2021

::: {.concise}
-   Data processing and package creation in R, creation and maintenance of SQL databases, analysis and interpretation of public data from the private health sector, creation of reports and dashboards using the Shiny package, and creation of statistical models.
:::

### Service Desk assistant

Atento Brasil

São Paulo, SP

2018 - 2017

::: {.concise}
-   Assisting employees, opening calls, installing programs, releasing access, administrative routines etc.
:::

## Language Proficiency {data-icon="language"}

### Portuguese

Native

N/A

### English

Limited working proficiency

N/A

### Spanish

Professional working proficiency
